embed.title: !gym
embed.description: Alerts for gym control changes and battle activity.

fields.name: By team
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}gym valor` — every gym takeover involving Valor
`{{prefix}}gym instinct mystic` — either team
`{{prefix}}gym everything` — every gym change in your area

Team names: `valor`, `mystic`, `instinct`, `harmony`, plus color aliases `red`/`blue`/`yellow`/`gray`.

fields.name: Change types
fields.value:
`slot_changes` — include alerts when a defender is added or removed (not just full takeovers)
`battle_changes` — include live-battle notifications
`ex` — EX raid eligible gyms only

fields.name: Gym filter
fields.value: `gym:gymname` — only a specific gym by name

fields.name: Message flags
fields.value:
`clean` — auto-delete (less useful for gym changes since they don't have an obvious expiry)
`ping`
